channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: What we know about Pakistan’s proposed Iran war pause
item.description: Pakistan’s Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif says diplomatic efforts to resolve the US-Israeli war on Iran are progressing.

item.title: Iranian musician stages protest at power station over Trump threats
item.description: Iranian musician Ali Ghamsari has been performing outside the Damavand power station in a symbolic protest.

item.title: Djibouti and the Horn of Africa: new front in the war on Iran
item.description: Djibouti built its economy on the strategy of charging rent to different military world powers.

item.title: Iran warns region and beyond as tension builds ahead of US ultimatum
item.description: Trump has threatened to step up the US-Israeli war on Iran by destroying every bridge and power plant in the country.

item.title: Pakistan appeals to Trump to extend deadline, Iran to reopen Hormuz Strait
item.description: PM Sharif cites progress in diplomatic efforts for peaceful settlement of war, urges to allow diplomacy run its course.

item.title: Iranians brace for possible devastation as Trump’s deadline looms
item.description: Anxiety grips Iran with looming threats of US-led strikes targeting civilian sites, in violation of international law.

item.title: How is the US-Israel war on Iran affecting Russian-Iranian relations?
item.description: Moscow has been benefitting from the higher oil prices while its ally is under attack.

item.title: Russia and China block UN resolution on Strait of Hormuz
item.description: A total 11 out of 15 members supported resolution, which was already watered down to evade vetoes.

item.title: Pope Leo slams Trump’s threat that Iran’s ‘civilisation will die’
item.description: Pope Leo condemned Trump’s threats that Iran’s “civilisation will die”, calling the remarks “unacceptable".

item.title: Mediterranean migrant deaths mounting towards 1,000 in 2026: UN
item.description: The International Organization for Migration laments one of the deadliest starts to a year since record keeping began.
